extraction.one_line_summary: BENNETT Sam won with a late surge after HODEG Álvaro José opened early left-side, avoiding chaos when GROENEWEGEN Dylan squeezed PEDERSEN Casper wide in final chicane.
tactical_patterns: HODEG moved left-side early for UAE creating slipstream BENNETT exploited, revealing leadout riders as unwitting pace donors.
GROENEWEGEN squeezed PEDERSEN wide in final chicane, showing Jumbo's willingness to compromise own sprint for positioning disruption.
ČERNÝ expended energy on intermediate sprint bonuses despite 1-minute gap revealing GC ambitions override breakaway survival logic.
BENNETT admitted legs felt poor at 70km but energy conservation via team positioning trumped raw form in final.

rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: won while feeling weak at 70km, suggesting superior team shelter and energy management overcomes inferior physical state
rider_signals.HODEG Álvaro José: positive: tactical early acceleration left-side created unexpected leadout for rivals, shows dangerous positioning instinct
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Casper: negative: squeezed wide by GROENEWEGEN in final chicane when positioned for sprint, vulnerable to aggressive lateral movement
rider_signals.ČERNÝ Josef: neutral: aggressively chased intermediate bonuses in doomed break, prioritizing GC seconds over breakaway cooperation
rider_signals.THEUNS Edward: negative: mentioned as potential factor but finished 14 seconds back, form not matching pre-race expectations
